resources.string: Maintaining a persistent MQTT connection to stream real-time sensor data to a remote broker for telemetry and analysis.
Continuous background monitoring of linear acceleration for real-time telemetry and motion analysis.
Continuous background monitoring of rotational velocity for real-time telemetry and orientation analysis.
Continuous background monitoring of gravity vectors for real-time telemetry and orientation analysis.
Continuous background monitoring of ambient light levels for environmental telemetry.
Continuous background monitoring of ambient temperature for environmental telemetry.
